title: Historical Bounded Non-Runtime Application-Source Host Trial Planning
historical_note: This packet records one bounded Olares Phase 5 non-runtime application-source host-trial planning slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.

use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this packet JSON only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier `olares-phase-5-021` bounded non-runtime application-source host-trial planning slice
objective: Define the smallest reversible application-source or test-only host-side trial that may follow Packet 020 by specifying the allowed source surfaces, prohibited runtime or service mutations, entry criteria, validation expectations, rollback triggers, evidence capture, and whether Packet 019 or Packet 020 local closure authority must first be published and resynchronized before any host-side execution depends on it.
active_role: Olares Non-Runtime Application-Source Host Trial Planner
dependency_note: Packet 020 closes with the workstation-migration lane bounded-trial-ready, not migration-ready, after Packet 019 restored publication hygiene for the second host-created trial artifact. This packet exists to define one precise non-runtime application-source or test-only host-side trial and to decide whether Packet 019 and Packet 020 local closure authority must be published before that later execution depends on it.
required_inputs: The Packet 020 ruling that the workstation-migration lane is bounded-trial-ready only, not migration-ready
The Packet 019 governing published commit `c91bd571dcaab9e7df82682d396ec3a01529b9dc` and synchronized `/home/olares/code/apex` host-mirror evidence
The Packet 014 and Packet 017 host-side trial evidence showing that only documentation or planning edits have been executed from the clean host mirror so far
The current workstation-local Packet 019 and Packet 020 closure authority drift that is not yet present on `/home/olares/code/apex`
The controlling authority-doc restatements in `Infrastructure/Olares_Workspace_Authority_Framework.md` and `Infrastructure/Olares_Build_Guide.md`
constrained_outputs: A dated planning handoff defining one small reversible application-source or test-only host-side trial from `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform`
A recorded decision on whether Packet 019 and Packet 020 closure authority must first be published and resynchronized before the later host-side trial executes
A written list of allowed actions, disallowed actions, validation expectations, failure triggers, and rollback rules for the later execution packet
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Confirm that Packet 020 completed and that its bounded-trial-ready verdict is the controlling lane state.

Define the exact candidate trial slice against `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform`, including whether the smallest truthful trial is application-source only, test-only, or a narrow combination of both.

List the exact allowed and prohibited file or surface classes, explicitly excluding runtime, services, infra, ingress, auth, secrets, remote changes, and mutation of `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
Define entry criteria, validation commands, success criteria, failure triggers, rollback triggers, and required evidence capture for any later host-side execution packet.
Decide whether Packet 019 and Packet 020 closure authority must first be published and host-resynchronized before any later host-side trial depends on those records.
Preserve the split decision surfaces: no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, and no host-runtime mutation.

Stop if execution would require migration approval, service changes, auth or ingress changes, install work, remote rewrite, force, reset, clean, or any mutation of `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes planning only. It does not authorize database writes, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or migration approval.
closure_note: Executed as a bounded planning lane. The selected later trial class is a one-file test-only application surface under `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`, scoped to extending the existing re-homed browser surfaces smoke coverage for the advertised PM schedule, upstream tracer, and variance static routes. Packet 021 performed no host-side source edit, no authority publication, no runtime mutation, no install, no service change, no remote rewrite, no force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation. Read-only host evidence confirmed `/home/olares/code/apex` remains clean at `c91bd571dcaab9e7df82682d396ec3a01529b9dc` but does not yet contain Packet 020 handoff or Packet 021 JSON, so Packet 019/020/021 closure authority must be published and resynchronized before any later host-side execution depends on it.
next_action: Open only a narrow next packet: `Olares Phase 5 022 - Packet 019 Through Packet 021 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate`. That packet should publish and resynchronize the bounded local closure authority set before any separate host-side test-only execution packet opens. Do not execute the planned test edit, approve migration, mutate runtime, change services, install dependencies, rewrite remotes, force, reset, clean, or mutate the old clone from Packet 022.
